methods.name: ClearId
methods.summary: Resets the HasId property of the model component to false, if possible.

methods.name: ClearIndex
methods.summary: Resets the HasIndex property of the model component to false, if possible.

methods.name: ClearName
methods.summary: Resets the HasName property of the model component to false, if possible.

methods.name: CreateBoxMapping
methods.signature: public static TextureMapping CreateBoxMapping(Plane plane, Interval dx, Interval dy, Interval dz, bool capped)
methods.summary: Create a box projection texture mapping.

params.name: plane
params.doc: The sides of the box the box are parallel to the plane's coordinate planes. The dx, dy, dz intervals determine the location of the sides.

params.name: dx
params.doc: Determines the location of the front and back planes. The vector plane.xaxis is perpendicular to these planes and they pass through plane.PointAt(dx[0],0,0) and plane.PointAt(dx[1],0,0), respectively.

params.name: dy
params.doc: Determines the location of the left and right planes. The vector plane.yaxis is perpendicular to these planes and they pass through plane.PointAt(0,dy[0],0) and plane.PointAt(0,dy[1],0), respectively.

params.name: dz
params.doc: Determines the location of the top and bottom planes. The vector plane.zaxis is perpendicular to these planes and they pass through plane.PointAt(0,0,dz[0]) and plane.PointAt(0,0,dz[1]), respectively.

params.name: capped
params.doc: If true, the box is treated as a finite capped box.

returns.doc: TextureMapping instance if input is valid

methods.name: CreateCustomMeshMapping
methods.summary: Create custom mesh mapping

params.name: mesh
params.doc: Mesh with texture coordinates

returns.doc: TextureMapping instance

methods.name: CreateCylinderMapping
methods.signature: public static TextureMapping CreateCylinderMapping(Cylinder cylinder, bool capped)
methods.summary: Create a cylindrical projection texture mapping.
methods.remarks: When the cylinder is capped and m_texture_space = divided, the cylinder is mapped to texture space as follows: The side is mapped to 0 <= "u" <= 2/3. The bottom is mapped to 2/3 <= "u" <= 5/6. The top is mapped to 5/6 <= "u" <= 5/6. This is the same convention box mapping uses.

params.name: cylinder
params.doc: cylinder in world space used to define a cylindrical coordinate system. The angular parameter maps (0,2pi) to texture "u" (0,1), The height parameter maps (height[0],height[1]) to texture "v" (0,1), and the radial parameter maps (0,r) to texture "w" (0,1).

params.name: capped
params.doc: If true, the cylinder is treated as a finite capped cylinder

returns.doc: TextureMapping instance if input is valid

methods.name: CreateOcsMapping
methods.summary: Create a Ocs texture mapping. Note that OCS mappings must be placed on mapping channel ON_ObjectRenderingAttributes::OCSMappingChannelId() otherwise they will not work.

params.name: plane
params.doc: A plane to use for mapping.

returns.doc: [Missing <returns> documentation for "M:Rhino.Render.TextureMapping.CreateOcsMapping(Rhino.Geometry.Plane)"]

methods.name: CreatePlaneMapping(Plane, Interval, Interval, Interval)
methods.signature: public static TextureMapping CreatePlaneMapping(Plane plane, Interval dx, Interval dy, Interval dz)
methods.summary: Create a planar UV projection texture mapping

params.name: plane
params.doc: A plane to use for mapping.

params.name: dx
params.doc: portion of the plane's x axis that is mapped to [0,1] (can be a decreasing interval)

params.name: dy
params.doc: portion of the plane's y axis that is mapped to [0,1] (can be a decreasing interval)

params.name: dz
params.doc: portion of the plane's z axis that is mapped to [0,1] (can be a decreasing interval)

returns.doc: TextureMapping instance if input is valid

methods.name: CreatePlaneMapping(Plane, Interval, Interval, Interval, Boolean)
methods.signature: public static TextureMapping CreatePlaneMapping(Plane plane, Interval dx, Interval dy, Interval dz, bool capped)
methods.summary: Create a planar projection texture mapping

params.name: plane
params.doc: A plane to use for mapping.

params.name: dx
params.doc: portion of the plane's x axis that is mapped to [0,1] (can be a decreasing interval)

params.name: dy
params.doc: portion of the plane's y axis that is mapped to [0,1] (can be a decreasing interval)

params.name: dz
params.doc: portion of the plane's z axis that is mapped to [0,1] (can be a decreasing interval)

params.name: capped
params.doc: set to true if planar UVW is meant, false for planar UV

returns.doc: TextureMapping instance if input is valid

methods.name: CreateSphereMapping
methods.summary: Create a spherical projection texture mapping.

params.name: sphere
params.doc: sphere in world space used to define a spherical coordinate system. The longitude parameter maps (0,2pi) to texture "u" (0,1). The latitude parameter maps (-pi/2,+pi/2) to texture "v" (0,1). The radial parameter maps (0,r) to texture "w" (0,1).

returns.doc: TextureMapping instance if input is valid

methods.name: CreateSurfaceParameterMapping
methods.summary: Create a mapping that will convert surface parameters into normalized(0,1)x(0,1) texture coordinates.

returns.doc: TextureMapping instance or null if failed.

methods.name: DataCRC
methods.summary: Increments the Cyclic Redundancy Check value by this instance.

params.name: currentRemainder
params.doc: The current remainder value.

returns.doc: The updated remainder value.

methods.name: Dispose()
methods.summary: Actively reclaims unmanaged resources that this instance uses.

methods.name: EnsurePrivateCopy
methods.summary: If you want to keep a copy of this class around by holding onto it in a variable after a command completes, call EnsurePrivateCopy to make sure that this class is not tied to the document. You can call this function as many times as you want.

methods.name: Evaluate(Point3d, Vector3d, Point3d)
methods.signature: public int Evaluate(Point3d p, Vector3d n, out Point3d t)
methods.summary: Evaluate the mapping to get a texture coordinate

params.name: p
params.doc: Vertex location

params.name: n
params.doc: If the mapping projection is ray_projection, then this is the vertex unit normal. Otherwise n is ignored.

params.name: t
params.doc: Texture coordinate (u,v,w)

returns.doc: Nonzero if evaluation is successful. When the mapping is a box or capped cylinder mapping, the value indicates which side was evaluated. Cylinder mapping: 1 = cylinder wall, 2 = bottom cap, 3 = top cap Box mapping: 1 = front, 2 = right, 3 = back, 4 = left, 5 = bottom, 6 = top

methods.name: Evaluate(Point3d, Vector3d, Point3d, Transform, Transform)
methods.signature: public int Evaluate(Point3d p, Vector3d n, out Point3d t, Transform pXform, Transform nXform)
methods.summary: Evaluate the mapping to get a texture coordinate

params.name: p
params.doc: Vertex location

params.name: n
params.doc: If the mapping projection is ray_projection, then this is the vertex unit normal. Otherwise n is ignored.

params.name: t
params.doc: Texture coordinate (u,v,w)

params.name: pXform
params.doc: Transformation to be applied to P before performing the mapping calculation.

params.name: nXform
params.doc: Transformation to be applied to N before performing the mapping calculation. One way to calculate nXxform is to use the call pXform::GetVectorTransform(nXform).

returns.doc: Nonzero if evaluation is successful. When the mapping is a box or capped cylinder mapping, the value indicates which side was evaluated. Cylinder mapping: 1 = cylinder wall, 2 = bottom cap, 3 = top cap Box mapping: 1 = front, 2 = right, 3 = back, 4 = left, 5 = bottom, 6 = top

methods.signature: public virtual void GetObjectData(SerializationInfo info, StreamingContext context)
methods.summary: Populates a System.Runtime.Serialization.SerializationInfo with the data needed to serialize the target object.

params.name: info

params.name: context
params.doc: The destination (see System.Runtime.Serialization.StreamingContext) for this serialization.

methods.name: IsValidWithLog
methods.summary: Determines if an object is valid. Also provides a report on errors if this object happens not to be valid.

params.name: log
params.doc: A textual log. This out parameter is assigned during this call.

returns.doc: true if this object is valid; false otherwise.

methods.summary: Locks the component Id property.

methods.name: LockIndex
methods.summary: Locks the component Index property.

methods.name: LockName
methods.summary: Locks the component Name property.

methods.summary: Create a JSON string representation of this object

methods.remarks: This is provided as a visual aid. Do not rely on this for serialization.

returns.doc: [Missing <returns> documentation for "M:Rhino.DocObjects.ModelComponent.ToString"]

methods.name: TryGetMappingBox(Plane, Interval, Interval, Interval)
methods.signature: public bool TryGetMappingBox(out Plane plane, out Interval dx, out Interval dy, out Interval dz)
methods.summary: Get a box projection from the texture mapping.
methods.remarks: Generally, GetMappingBox will not return the same parameters passed to SetBoxMapping. However, the location of the box will be the same.

params.name: plane
params.doc: The center of the box is at plane.origin and the sides of the box are parallel to the plane's coordinate planes.

params.name: dx
params.doc: The "front" and "back" sides of the box are in spanned by the vectors plane.yaxis and plane.zaxis. The back plane contains the point plane.PointAt(dx[0],0,0) and the front plane contains the point plane.PointAt(dx[1],0,0).

params.name: dy
params.doc: The "left" and "right" sides of the box are in spanned by the vectors plane.zaxis and plane.xaxis. The left plane contains the point plane.PointAt(0,dx[0],0) and the back plane contains the point plane.PointAt(0,dy[1],0).

params.name: dz
params.doc: The "top" and "bottom" sides of the box are in spanned by the vectors plane.xaxis and plane.yaxis. The bottom plane contains the point plane.PointAt(0,0,dz[0]) and the top plane contains the point plane.PointAt(0,0,dz[1]).

returns.doc: Returns true if a valid box is returned.

methods.name: TryGetMappingBox(Plane, Interval, Interval, Interval, Boolean)
methods.signature: public bool TryGetMappingBox(out Plane plane, out Interval dx, out Interval dy, out Interval dz, out bool capped)
methods.summary: Get a box projection from the texture mapping, including capped information
methods.remarks: Generally, GetMappingBox will not return the same parameters passed to SetBoxMapping. However, the location of the box will be the same.

params.name: plane
params.doc: The center of the box is at plane.origin and the sides of the box are parallel to the plane's coordinate planes.

params.name: dx
params.doc: The "front" and "back" sides of the box are in spanned by the vectors plane.yaxis and plane.zaxis. The back plane contains the point plane.PointAt(dx[0],0,0) and the front plane contains the point plane.PointAt(dx[1],0,0).

params.name: dy
params.doc: The "left" and "right" sides of the box are in spanned by the vectors plane.zaxis and plane.xaxis. The left plane contains the point plane.PointAt(0,dx[0],0) and the back plane contains the point plane.PointAt(0,dy[1],0).

params.name: dz
params.doc: The "top" and "bottom" sides of the box are in spanned by the vectors plane.xaxis and plane.yaxis. The bottom plane contains the point plane.PointAt(0,0,dz[0]) and the top plane contains the point plane.PointAt(0,0,dz[1]).

params.name: capped
params.doc: true if box mapping is capped.

returns.doc: Returns true if a valid box is returned.

methods.name: TryGetMappingCylinder(Cylinder)
methods.summary: Get a cylindrical projection parameters from this texture mapping.
methods.remarks: Generally, GetMappingCylinder will not return the same parameters passed to SetCylinderMapping. However, the location of the cylinder will be the same. If this mapping is not cylindrical, the cylinder will approximate the actual mapping primitive.

params.name: cylinder
params.doc: [Missing <param name="cylinder"/> documentation for "M:Rhino.Render.TextureMapping.TryGetMappingCylinder(Rhino.Geometry.Cylinder@)"]

returns.doc: Returns true if a valid cylinder is returned.

methods.signature: public bool TryGetMappingCylinder(out Cylinder cylinder, out bool capped)
methods.summary: Get a cylindrical projection parameters from this texture mapping.
methods.remarks: Generally, GetMappingCylinder will not return the same parameters passed to SetCylinderMapping. However, the location of the cylinder will be the same. If this mapping is not cylindrical, the cylinder will approximate the actual mapping primitive.

params.name: cylinder
params.doc: [Missing <param name="cylinder"/> documentation for "M:Rhino.Render.TextureMapping.TryGetMappingCylinder(Rhino.Geometry.Cylinder@,System.Boolean@)"]

params.name: capped
params.doc: will be true if capped

returns.doc: Returns true if a valid cylinder is returned.

methods.summary: Get custom mapping mesh from this texture mapping.

methods.name: TryGetMappingSphere
methods.summary: Get a spherical projection parameters from this texture mapping.
methods.remarks: Generally, GetMappingShere will not return the same parameters passed to SetSphereMapping. However, the location of the sphere will be the same. If this mapping is not cylindrical, the cylinder will approximate the actual mapping primitive.

properties.name: Capped
properties.summary: // The m_bCapped applies to planar, cylinder and box mappings. If m_bCapped is false, the cylinder or box is "infinite", if m_bCapped is true, they are finite. In planar mappings, m_bCapped=false means "the Z texture coordinate will always be 0.0" this is now the default behaviour in Rhino 5.0 - it's what users expect apparently.

properties.name: ComponentStatus
properties.summary: Gets or sets the component status of the model component.

properties.name: ComponentType
properties.summary: Returns TextureMapping.

properties.name: DeletedName
properties.summary: Gets the name of a component that is deleted.

properties.name: Disposed
properties.summary: Indicates if this object has been disposed or the document it originally belonged to has been disposed.

properties.name: HasId
properties.summary: Returns a value indicating whether the component has an ID.

properties.name: HasIndex
properties.summary: Returns a value indicating whether the component has an Index.

properties.name: HasName
properties.summary: Returns a value indicating whether the component has a Name.

properties.name: HasUserData
properties.summary: Gets true if this class has any custom information attached to it through UserData.

properties.name: Id
properties.summary: The unique Id for this texture mapping object.

properties.name: IdIsLocked
properties.summary: Returns a value indicating whether the component ID is already locked.

properties.name: Index
properties.summary: Gets or sets the model component index attribute.

properties.name: IndexIsLocked
properties.summary: Returns a value indicating whether the component Index is already locked.

properties.name: InstanceDefinitionModelSerialNumber
properties.summary: When a component is in a model as part of the information required for a linked instance definition, this value identifies the linked instance definition reference model.
properties.remarks: Reference components are not saved in .3dm archives. Typically this value is set and locked by the code that adds a component to a model. This value is not saved in .3dm archives.

properties.name: IsComponentStatusLocked
properties.summary: The component status itself can be locked. This returns an indication.

properties.name: IsDeleted
properties.summary: true if the component is deleted. Deleted components are kept by the document for undo purposes.

properties.name: IsDocumentControlled
properties.summary: If true this object may not be modified. Any properties or functions that attempt to modify this object when it is set to "IsReadOnly" will throw a NotSupportedException.

properties.name: IsReference
properties.summary: Gets a value indicting whether this component is a referenced component. Referenced components are part of referenced documents.

properties.name: IsSystemComponent
properties.summary: True if this model component is a system constant. An incomplete list of system constant model components is below:ON_ModelComponent::Unset ON_InstanceDefinition::Empty ON_Linetype::UnsetON_Linetype::ContinuousON_Linetype::ByLayerON_Linetype::ByParent ON_Layer::UnsetON_Layer::Default ON_TextStyle::UnsetON_TextStyle::DefaultON_TextStyle::ByLayerON_TextStyle::ByParent ON_DimStyle::UnsetON_DimStyle::DefaultON_DimStyle::DefaultInchDecimalON_DimStyle::DefaultInchFractionalON_DimStyle::DefaultFootInchArchitectureON_DimStyle::DefaultMillimeterSmallON_DimStyle::DefaultMillimeterLargeON_DimStyle::DefaultMillimeterArchitecture

properties.name: IsValid
properties.summary: Tests an object to see if it is valid.

properties.name: MappingType
properties.summary: Texture mapping type associated with this Mapping object.

properties.name: ModelSerialNumber
properties.summary: A value identifying the model that manages this component.
properties.remarks: If the component is being managed by a model, this value identifies the model. In Rhino, this value is the document runtime serial number. Typically this value is set and locked by the code that adds a component to a model. This value is not saved in .3dm archives.

properties.name: Name
properties.summary: Gets or sets the name

properties.name: NameIsLocked
properties.summary: Returns a value indicating whether the component Name is already locked.

properties.name: NormalTransform
properties.summary: For primitive based mappings, these transformations are used to map the world coordinate (x,y,z) point P and surface normal N before it is projected to the normalized mapping primitive. The surface normal transformation, m_Nxyz, is always calculated from m_Pxyz. It is a runtime setting that is not saved in 3dm files. If m_type is srfp_mapping, then m_Pxyz and m_Nxyz are ignored.

properties.name: PrimativeTransform
properties.summary: For primitive based mappings, these transformations are used to map the world coordinate (x,y,z) point P and surface normal N before it is projected to the normalized mapping primitive. The surface normal transformation, m_Nxyz, is always calculated from m_Pxyz. It is a runtime setting that is not saved in 3dm files. If m_type is srfp_mapping, then m_Pxyz and m_Nxyz are ignored.

properties.name: PrimitiveTransform
properties.summary: For primitive based mappings, these transformations are used to map the world coordinate (x,y,z) point P and surface normal N before it is projected to the normalized mapping primitive. The surface normal transformation, m_Nxyz, is always calculated from m_Pxyz. It is a runtime setting that is not saved in 3dm files. If m_type is srfp_mapping, then m_Pxyz and m_Nxyz are ignored.

properties.name: Projection
properties.summary: See Projection

properties.name: ReferenceModelSerialNumber
properties.summary: When a component is in a model for reference, this value identifies the reference model.
properties.remarks: Reference components are not saved in .3dm archives. Typically this value is set and locked by the code that adds a component to a model. This value is not saved in .3dm archives.

properties.name: TextureSpace
properties.summary: See TextureSpace

properties.name: UserData
properties.summary: List of custom information that is attached to this class.

properties.name: UserDictionary
properties.summary: Dictionary of custom information attached to this class. The dictionary is actually user data provided as an easy to use shareable set of information.

properties.name: UvwTransform
properties.summary: Transform applied to mapping coordinate (u,v,w) to convert it into a texture coordinate.
